name: Pepper Salad (Kraus)
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Roast the peppers for 45 minutes, turning them several times until the skin is charred all over.
3. Remove the peppers from the oven and let them steam in a paper bag for 15 minutes.
4. Alternatively, grill the peppers whole, then peel and seed them carefully.
5. Cut the peppers open, remove the stem and seeds, and slice into 1/4-inch pieces.
6. Heat oil in a pan over low heat. Add garlic and sauté for about one minute.
7. Add the pepper slices and cook for five more minutes.
8. Stir in half of the chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper to taste.
9. Remove from heat and add capers. If desired, add balsamic vinegar for extra sharpness.
10. Cool, season with additional salt and pepper if needed, and garnish with remaining chopped parsley.
